image_metadata.caption: Photograph of Henri Léon Lebesgue (1875-1941), who laid the groundwork for modern measure theory and remade the theory of integration.  (Courtesy of {{% resource_link "c0af56c6-5c4c-4fd5-b218-e7243467e1bf" "The MacTutor History of Mathematics Archive" %}}, University of St. Andrews.)
